channel.title: Courses on TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !
channel.description: Recent content in Courses on TECHATPARK - BUILDING PRO-GRAMMERS !

item.title: Open Source means Business
item.description: Open Source is a stupid idea The People Talent Company System Definition “Opensource means technology that is run by some great people who does not care about much money and makes cheap business solutions.” Testing Times Software Development - Developing Software Work around the product - work on the product On Solution fits all to One Solutions fits with all Design for destruction THE CHANGE Software Recipes THE Skills THE Mindset THE Purpose Lets Buy the Skill Fresh Talent Experience Fresh Talent Tier 1 Strong Academics Good English Experience DS and Algo Value of Words THE PROBLEM 3 Months Notice Company Reduce Salary to 50% (9L) Market Resumes Pachai gets an offer 11L 2 Month More Pachai gets an offer 13L 1 Month More Pachai gets an offer 15L 15 Days More Pachai gets an offer 17L Just few Days More ?
